text: Now let me examine the IstioCSR controller files and related constants.

content:
1	package istiocsr
2	
3	import (
4		"context"
5		"fmt"
6		"reflect"
7		"strings"
8	
9		appsv1 "k8s.io/api/apps/v1"
10		corev1 "k8s.io/api/core/v1"
11		networkingv1 "k8s.io/api/networking/v1"
12		rbacv1 "k8s.io/api/rbac/v1"
13		"k8s.io/apimachinery/pkg/api/errors"
14		"k8s.io/apimachinery/pkg/runtime"
15		"k8s.io/apimachinery/pkg/types"
16		"k8s.io/client-go/tools/record"
17	
18		ctrl "sigs.k8s.io/controller-runtime"
19		"sigs.k8s.io/controller-runtime/pkg/builder"
20		"sigs.k8s.io/controller-runtime/pkg/client"
21		"sigs.k8s.io/controller-runtime/pkg/handler"
22		"sigs.k8s.io/controller-runtime/pkg/predicate"
23		"sigs.k8s.io/controller-runtime/pkg/reconcile"
24	
25		"github.com/go-logr/logr"
26	
27		certmanagerv1 "github.com/cert-manager/cert-manager/pkg/apis/certmanager/v1"
28	
29		v1alpha1 "github.com/openshift/cert-manager-operator/api/operator/v1alpha1"
30		"github.com/openshift/cert-manager-operator/pkg/controller/common"
31	)
32	
33	// RequestEnqueueLabelValue is the label value used for filtering reconcile
34	// events to include only the resources created by the IstioCSR controller.
35	// The label key is common.ManagedResourceLabelKey.
36	const RequestEnqueueLabelValue = "cert-manager-istio-csr"
37	
38	// Reconciler reconciles a IstioCSR object.
39	type Reconciler struct {
40		common.CtrlClient
41	
42		ctx           context.Context
43		eventRecorder record.EventRecorder
44		log           logr.Logger
45		scheme        *runtime.Scheme
46	}
47	
48	// +kubebuilder:rbac:groups=operator.openshift.io,resources=istiocsrs,verbs=get;list;watch;update;patch
49	// +kubebuilder:rbac:groups=operator.openshift.io,resources=istiocsrs/status,verbs=get;update;patch
50	// +kubebuilder:rbac:groups=operator.openshift.io,resources=istiocsrs/finalizers,verbs=update
51	// +kubebuilder:rbac:groups=networking.k8s.io,resources=networkpolicies,verbs=get;list;watch;create;update;patch;delete
52	
53	// New returns a new Reconciler instance.
54	func New(mgr ctrl.Manager) (*Reconciler, error) {
55		c, err := common.NewClient(mgr)
56		if err != nil {
57			return nil, err
58		}
59		return &Reconciler{
60			CtrlClient:    c,
61			ctx:           context.Background(),
62			eventRecorder: mgr.GetEventRecorderFor(ControllerName),
63			log:           ctrl.Log.WithName(ControllerName),
64			scheme:        mgr.GetScheme(),
65		}, nil
66	}
67	
68	// SetupWithManager sets up the controller with the Manager.
69	func (r *Reconciler) SetupWithManager(mgr ctrl.Manager) error {
70		mapFunc := func(ctx context.Context, obj client.Object) []reconcile.Request {
71			r.log.V(4).Info("received reconcile event", "object", fmt.Sprintf("%T", obj), "name", obj.GetName(), "namespace", obj.GetNamespace())
72	
73			objLabels := obj.GetLabels()
74			if objLabels != nil {
75				// will look for custom label set on objects not created in istiocsr namespace, and if it exists,
76				// namespace in the reconcile request will be set same, else since label check matches is an object
77				// created by controller, and we safely assume, it's in the istiocsr namespace.
78				namespace := objLabels[istiocsrNamespaceMappingLabelName]
79				if namespace == "" {
80					namespace = obj.GetNamespace()
81				}
82	
83				labelOk := func() bool {
84					if objLabels[common.ManagedResourceLabelKey] == RequestEnqueueLabelValue {
85						return true
86					}
87					value := objLabels[IstiocsrResourceWatchLabelName]
88					if value == "" {
89						return false
90					}
91					key := strings.Split(value, "_")
92					if len(key) != 2 {
93						r.log.Error(fmt.Errorf("invalid label format"), "%s label value(%s) not in expected format on %s resource", IstiocsrResourceWatchLabelName, value, obj.GetName())
94						return false
95					}
96					namespace = key[0]
97					return true
98				}
99	
100				if labelOk() && namespace != "" {
101					return []reconcile.Request{
102						{
103							NamespacedName: types.NamespacedName{
104								Name:      istiocsrObjectName,
105								Namespace: namespace,
106							},
107						},
108					}
109				}
110			}
111	
112			r.log.V(4).Info("object not of interest, ignoring reconcile event", "object", fmt.Sprintf("%T", obj), "name", obj.GetName(), "namespace", obj.GetNamespace())
113			return []reconcile.Request{}
114		}
115	
116		// predicate function to ignore events for objects not managed by controller.
117		controllerManagedResources := predicate.NewPredicateFuncs(func(object client.Object) bool {
118			return object.GetLabels() != nil && object.GetLabels()[common.ManagedResourceLabelKey] == RequestEnqueueLabelValue
119		})
120	
121		// predicate function to filter events for objects which controller is interested in, but
122		// not managed or created by controller.
123		controllerWatchResources := predicate.NewPredicateFuncs(func(object client.Object) bool {
124			return object.GetLabels() != nil && object.GetLabels()[IstiocsrResourceWatchLabelName] != ""
125		})
126	
127		controllerConfigMapPredicates := predicate.NewPredicateFuncs(func(object client.Object) bool {
128			if object.GetLabels() == nil {
129				return false
130			}
131			// Accept if it's a managed ConfigMap OR a watched ConfigMap
132			return object.GetLabels()[common.ManagedResourceLabelKey] == RequestEnqueueLabelValue ||
133				object.GetLabels()[IstiocsrResourceWatchLabelName] != ""
134		})
135	
136		withIgnoreStatusUpdatePredicates := builder.WithPredicates(predicate.GenerationChangedPredicate{}, controllerManagedResources)
137		controllerWatchResourcePredicates := builder.WithPredicates(predicate.ResourceVersionChangedPredicate{}, controllerWatchResources)
138		controllerManagedResourcePredicates := builder.WithPredicates(controllerManagedResources)
139		controllerConfigMapWatchPredicates := builder.WithPredicates(predicate.ResourceVersionChangedPredicate{}, controllerConfigMapPredicates)
140	
141		return ctrl.NewControllerManagedBy(mgr).
142			For(&v1alpha1.IstioCSR{}, builder.WithPredicates(predicate.GenerationChangedPredicate{})).
143			Named(ControllerName).
144			Watches(&certmanagerv1.Certificate{}, handler.EnqueueRequestsFromMapFunc(mapFunc), withIgnoreStatusUpdatePredicates).
145			Watches(&appsv1.Deployment{}, handler.EnqueueRequestsFromMapFunc(mapFunc), withIgnoreStatusUpdatePredicates).
146			Watches(&rbacv1.ClusterRole{}, handler.EnqueueRequestsFromMapFunc(mapFunc), controllerManagedResourcePredicates).
147			Watches(&rbacv1.ClusterRoleBinding{}, handler.EnqueueRequestsFromMapFunc(mapFunc), controllerManagedResourcePredicates).
148			Watches(&rbacv1.Role{}, handler.EnqueueRequestsFromMapFunc(mapFunc), controllerManagedResourcePredicates).
149			Watches(&rbacv1.RoleBinding{}, handler.EnqueueRequestsFromMapFunc(mapFunc), controllerManagedResourcePredicates).
150			Watches(&corev1.Service{}, handler.EnqueueRequestsFromMapFunc(mapFunc), controllerManagedResourcePredicates).
151			Watches(&corev1.ServiceAccount{}, handler.EnqueueRequestsFromMapFunc(mapFunc), controllerManagedResourcePredicates).
152			Watches(&corev1.ConfigMap{}, handler.EnqueueRequestsFromMapFunc(mapFunc), controllerConfigMapWatchPredicates).
153			WatchesMetadata(&corev1.Secret{}, handler.EnqueueRequestsFromMapFunc(mapFunc), controllerWatchResourcePredicates).
154			Watches(&networkingv1.NetworkPolicy{}, handler.EnqueueRequestsFromMapFunc(mapFunc), controllerManagedResourcePredicates).
155			Watches(&certmanagerv1.Issuer{}, handler.EnqueueRequestsFromMapFunc(mapFunc), controllerWatchResourcePredicates).
156			Watches(&certmanagerv1.ClusterIssuer{}, handler.EnqueueRequestsFromMapFunc(mapFunc), controllerWatchResourcePredicates).
157			Complete(r)
158	}
159	
160	// Reconcile function to compare the state specified by the IstioCSR object against the actual cluster state,
161	// and to make the cluster state reflect the state specified by the user.
162	func (r *Reconciler) Reconcile(ctx context.Context, req ctrl.Request) (ctrl.Result, error) {
163		r.log.V(1).Info("reconciling", "request", req)
164	
165		// Fetch the istiocsr.openshift.operator.io CR
166		istiocsr := &v1alpha1.IstioCSR{}
167		if err := r.Get(ctx, req.NamespacedName, istiocsr); err != nil {
168			if errors.IsNotFound(err) {
169				// NotFound errors, since they can't be fixed by an immediate
170				// requeue (have to wait for a new notification), and can be processed
171				// on deleted requests.
172				r.log.V(1).Info("istiocsr.openshift.operator.io object not found, skipping reconciliation", "request", req)
173				return ctrl.Result{}, nil
174			}
175			return ctrl.Result{}, fmt.Errorf("failed to fetch istiocsr.openshift.operator.io %q during reconciliation: %w", req.NamespacedName, err)
176		}
177	
178		if !istiocsr.DeletionTimestamp.IsZero() {
179			r.log.V(1).Info("istiocsr.openshift.operator.io is marked for deletion", "namespace", req.NamespacedName)
180	
181			if requeue, err := r.cleanUp(istiocsr); err != nil {
182				return ctrl.Result{}, fmt.Errorf("clean up failed for %q istiocsr.openshift.operator.io instance deletion: %w", req.NamespacedName, err)
183			} else if requeue {
184				return ctrl.Result{RequeueAfter: defaultRequeueTime}, nil
185			}
186	
187			if err := r.removeFinalizer(ctx, istiocsr, finalizer); err != nil {
188				return ctrl.Result{}, err
189			}
190	
191			r.log.V(1).Info("removed finalizer, cleanup complete", "request", req.NamespacedName)
192			return ctrl.Result{}, nil
193		}
194	
195		// Set finalizers on the istiocsr.openshift.operator.io resource
196		if err := r.addFinalizer(ctx, istiocsr); err != nil {
197			return ctrl.Result{}, fmt.Errorf("failed to update %q istiocsr.openshift.operator.io with finalizers: %w", req.NamespacedName, err)
198		}
199	
200		return r.processReconcileRequest(istiocsr, req.NamespacedName)
201	}
202	
203	func (r *Reconciler) processReconcileRequest(istiocsr *v1alpha1.IstioCSR, req types.NamespacedName) (ctrl.Result, error) {
204		istioCSRCreateRecon := false
205		if !containsProcessedAnnotation(istiocsr) && reflect.DeepEqual(istiocsr.Status, v1alpha1.IstioCSRStatus{}) {
206			r.log.V(1).Info("starting reconciliation of newly created istiocsr", "namespace", istiocsr.GetNamespace(), "name", istiocsr.GetName())
207			istioCSRCreateRecon = true
208		}
209	
210		if err := r.disallowMultipleIstioCSRInstances(istiocsr); err != nil {
211			if common.IsMultipleInstanceError(err) {
212				r.eventRecorder.Eventf(istiocsr, corev1.EventTypeWarning, "MultiIstioCSRInstance", "creation of multiple istiocsr instances is not supported, will not be processed")
213				err = nil
214			}
215			return ctrl.Result{}, err
216		}
217	
218		reconcileErr := r.reconcileIstioCSRDeployment(istiocsr, istioCSRCreateRecon)
219		if reconcileErr != nil {
220			r.log.Error(reconcileErr, "failed to reconcile IstioCSR deployment", "request", req)
221		}
222	
223		return common.HandleReconcileResult(
224			&istiocsr.Status.ConditionalStatus,
225			reconcileErr,
226			r.log.WithValues("namespace", istiocsr.GetNamespace(), "name", istiocsr.GetName()),
227			func(prependErr error) error {
228				return r.updateCondition(istiocsr, prependErr)
229			},
230			defaultRequeueTime,
231		)
232	}
233	
234	// cleanUp handles deletion of istiocsr.openshift.operator.io gracefully.
235	//
236	//nolint:unparam // error return is kept for future implementation
237	func (r *Reconciler) cleanUp(istiocsr *v1alpha1.IstioCSR) (bool, error) {
238		// TODO: For GA, handle cleaning up of resources created for installing istio-csr operand.
239		// This might require a validation webhook to check for usage of service as GRPC endpoint in
240		// any of OpenShift Service Mesh or Istiod deployments to avoid disruptions across cluster.
241		r.eventRecorder.Eventf(istiocsr, corev1.EventTypeWarning, "RemoveDeployment", "%s/%s istiocsr marked for deletion, remove reference in istiod deployment and remove all resources created for istiocsr deployment", istiocsr.GetNamespace(), istiocsr.GetName())
242		return false, nil
243	}
244

1	package istiocsr
2	
3	import (
4		"os"
5		"strings"
6		"time"
7	
8		certmanagerapi "github.com/cert-manager/cert-manager/pkg/apis/certmanager"
9		certmanagerv1 "github.com/cert-manager/cert-manager/pkg/apis/certmanager/v1"
10	)
11	
12	const (
13		// istiocsrCommonName is the name commonly used for naming resources.
14		istiocsrCommonName = "cert-manager-istio-csr"
15	
16		// ControllerName is the name of the controller used in logs and events.
17		ControllerName = istiocsrCommonName + "-controller"
18	
19		// controllerProcessedAnnotation is the annotation added to istiocsr resource once after
20		// successful reconciliation by the controller.
21		controllerProcessedAnnotation = "operator.openshift.io/istio-csr-processed"
22	
23		// controllerProcessingRejectedAnnotation is the annotation added to istiocsr resource when multiple
24		// instances of istiocsr resource is created.
25		controllerProcessingRejectedAnnotation = "operator.openshift.io/istio-csr-reject-multiple-instance"
26	
27		// finalizer name for istiocsr.openshift.operator.io resource.
28		finalizer = "istiocsr.openshift.operator.io/" + ControllerName
29	
30		// defaultRequeueTime is the default reconcile requeue time.
31		defaultRequeueTime = time.Second * 30
32	
33		// istiocsrObjectName is the name of the istio-csr resource created by user.
34		// istio-csr CRD enforces name to be `default`.
35		istiocsrObjectName = "default"
36	
37		// istiocsrContainerName is the name of the container created for istiocsr.
38		istiocsrContainerName = istiocsrCommonName
39	
40		// istiocsrImageNameEnvVarName is the environment variable key name
41		// containing the image name of the istiocsr as value.
42		istiocsrImageNameEnvVarName = "RELATED_IMAGE_CERT_MANAGER_ISTIOCSR"
43	
44		// istiocsrImageVersionEnvVarName is the environment variable key name
45		// containing the image version of the istiocsr as value.
46		istiocsrImageVersionEnvVarName = "ISTIOCSR_OPERAND_IMAGE_VERSION"
47	
48		// defaultClusterID is the default Kubernetes cluster identifier used by istio-csr
49		// when no custom cluster ID is configured.
50		defaultClusterID = "Kubernetes"
51	
52		// defaultIstioRevision is the Istio default revision name. When this revision is
53		// specified, the DNS SAN uses the base istiod service name rather than a
54		// revision-prefixed name.
55		defaultIstioRevision = "default"
56	
57		// istiocsrGRPCEndpointFmt is the format string for the istiocsr GRPC service endpoint.
58		istiocsrGRPCEndpointFmt = "%s.%s.svc:%d"
59	
60		// istiodCertificateCommonNameFmt is the format string for deriving the istiod certificate common name
61		// and default DNS name.
62		istiodCertificateCommonNameFmt = "istiod.%s.svc"
63	
64		// istiodCertificateRevisionBasedDNSName is the format string for deriving the istiod certificate DNS name
65		// for each defined revision.
66		istiodCertificateRevisionBasedDNSName = "istiod-%s.%s.svc"
67	
68		// istiodCertificateSpiffeURIFmt is the format string for deriving the istiod certificate URI.
69		istiodCertificateSpiffeURIFmt = "spiffe://%s/ns/%s/sa/istiod-service-account"
70	
71		// istiocsrNamespaceMappingLabelName is the label name for identifying the cluster resources or resources
72		// created in other namespaces by the controller.
73		istiocsrNamespaceMappingLabelName = "cert-manager-istio-csr-namespace"
74	
75		// IstiocsrResourceWatchLabelName is the label name for identifying the resources of interest for the
76		// controller but does not create or manage the resource.
77		IstiocsrResourceWatchLabelName = "istiocsr.openshift.operator.io/watched-by"
78	
79		// istiocsrResourceWatchLabelName is the value format assigned to istiocsrResourceWatchLabelName label, which
80		// will be of the form <istiocsr_namespace>/<istiocsr_instance-Name>.
81		istiocsrResourceWatchLabelValueFmt = "%s_%s"
82	
83		// IstiocsrCAConfigMapName is the name of the configmap which is mounted in istiocsr container, containing the
84		// CA certificate configured in the secret referenced in the issuer.
85		IstiocsrCAConfigMapName = istiocsrCommonName + "-issuer-ca-copy"
86	
87		// IstiocsrCAKeyName is the key name holding the CA certificate in the issuer secret or the controller
88		// CA configmap.
89		IstiocsrCAKeyName = "ca.crt"
90	)
91	
92	var (
93		controllerDefaultResourceLabels = map[string]string{
94			"app":                          istiocsrCommonName,
95			"app.kubernetes.io/name":       istiocsrCommonName,
96			"app.kubernetes.io/instance":   istiocsrCommonName,
97			"app.kubernetes.io/version":    os.Getenv(istiocsrImageVersionEnvVarName),
98			"app.kubernetes.io/managed-by": "cert-manager-operator",
99			"app.kubernetes.io/part-of":    "cert-manager-operator",
100		}
101	)
102	
103	var (
104		clusterIssuerKind = strings.ToLower(certmanagerv1.ClusterIssuerKind)
105		issuerKind        = strings.ToLower(certmanagerv1.IssuerKind)
106		issuerGroup       = strings.ToLower(certmanagerapi.GroupName)
107	)
108	
109	// asset names are the files present in the root bindata/ dir. Which are then loaded
110	// and made available by the pkg/operator/assets package.
111	const (
112		certificateAssetName        = "istio-csr/istiod-certificate.yaml"
113		clusterRoleAssetName        = "istio-csr/cert-manager-istio-csr-clusterrole.yaml"
114		clusterRoleBindingAssetName = "istio-csr/cert-manager-istio-csr-clusterrolebinding.yaml"
115		deploymentAssetName         = "istio-csr/cert-manager-istio-csr-deployment.yaml"
116		roleAssetName               = "istio-csr/cert-manager-istio-csr-role.yaml"
117		roleLeasesAssetName         = "istio-csr/cert-manager-istio-csr-leases-role.yaml"
118		roleBindingAssetName        = "istio-csr/cert-manager-istio-csr-rolebinding.yaml"
119		roleBindingLeasesAssetName  = "istio-csr/cert-manager-istio-csr-leases-rolebinding.yaml"
120		serviceAssetName            = "istio-csr/cert-manager-istio-csr-service.yaml"
121		metricsServiceAssetName     = "istio-csr/cert-manager-istio-csr-metrics-service.yaml"
122		serviceAccountAssetName     = "istio-csr/cert-manager-istio-csr-serviceaccount.yaml"
123	)
124	
125	const (
126		DefaultCertificateDuration            = time.Hour
127		DefaultCertificateRenewBeforeDuration = time.Minute * 30
128		DefaultPrivateKeyAlgorithm            = certmanagerv1.RSAKeyAlgorithm
129		DefaultRSAPrivateKeySize              = 2048
130		DefaultECDSA256PrivateKeySize         = 256
131		DefaultECDSA384PrivateKeySize         = 384
132	)
133	
134	var istioCSRNetworkPolicyAssets = []string{
135		"networkpolicies/istio-csr-deny-all-networkpolicy.yaml",
136		"networkpolicies/istio-csr-allow-egress-to-api-server-networkpolicy.yaml",
137		"networkpolicies/istio-csr-allow-ingress-to-metrics-networkpolicy.yaml",
138		"networkpolicies/istio-csr-allow-ingress-to-grpc-networkpolicy.yaml",
139	}

text: Now let me look at the trustmanager controller to see how it stamps the hash on the deployment and the `install_istiocsr.go` file.
Now let me see how trustmanager threads the hash through and the constants.

content:
1	package trustmanager
2	
3	import (
4		"os"
5		"time"
6	
7		"k8s.io/apimachinery/pkg/util/validation/field"
8	)
9	
10	const (

12		trustManagerCommonName = "cert-manager-trust-manager"

24		// trust-manager CRD enforces name to be `cluster`.
25		trustManagerObjectName = "cluster"
26

28		// containing the image name of the trust-manager as value.

30	
31		// trustManagerImageVersionEnvVarName is the environment variable key name
32		// containing the image version of the trust-manager as value.
33		trustManagerImageVersionEnvVarName = "TRUSTMANAGER_OPERAND_IMAGE_VERSION"
34	
35		// defaultTrustNamespace is the default namespace where trust-manager looks for trust sources.
36		defaultTrustNamespace = "cert-manager"

50	)

52	// DefaultCAPackage constants.
53	const (
54		// defaultCAPackageConfigMapName is the ConfigMap in the operand namespace that
55		// contains the formatted JSON CA package for trust-manager.
56		defaultCAPackageConfigMapName = "trust-manager-default-ca-package"
57	
58		// defaultCAPackageName is the package name used in the JSON CA package.
59		defaultCAPackageName = "cert-manager-package-openshift"
60	
61		// defaultCAPackageFilename is the filename used for the JSON package inside the ConfigMap.
62		defaultCAPackageFilename = defaultCAPackageName + ".json"
63	
64		// defaultCAPackageVolumeName is the volume name used in the deployment.
65		defaultCAPackageVolumeName = "packages"
66	
67		// defaultCAPackageMountPath is where the package volume is mounted in the container.
68		defaultCAPackageMountPath = "/packages"
69	
70		// defaultCAPackageLocation is the full path to the JSON package file inside the container.
71		defaultCAPackageLocation = defaultCAPackageMountPath + "/" + defaultCAPackageFilename
72	
73		// defaultCAPackageHashAnnotation is the pod template annotation that tracks the CA bundle hash.
74		defaultCAPackageHashAnnotation = "operator.openshift.io/default-ca-package-hash"
75	)

84		trustManagerDeploymentName     = trustManagerCommonResourceName
85

87		trustManagerMetricsServiceName = trustManagerCommonResourceName + "-metrics"
88

90		trustManagerClusterRoleBindingName = trustManagerCommonResourceName
91	
92		trustManagerRoleName        = trustManagerCommonResourceName
93		trustManagerRoleBindingName = trustManagerCommonResourceName
94	
95		trustManagerLeaderElectionRoleName        = trustManagerCommonResourceName + ":leaderelection"
96		trustManagerLeaderElectionRoleBindingName = trustManagerCommonResourceName + ":leaderelection"
97	
98		trustManagerIssuerName      = trustManagerCommonResourceName
99		trustManagerCertificateName = trustManagerCommonResourceName
100		trustManagerTLSSecretName   = trustManagerCommonResourceName + "-tls"
101	
102		trustManagerWebhookConfigName = trustManagerCommonResourceName
103	)

107		controllerConfigFieldPath       = field.NewPath("spec", "controllerConfig")

125		// Predicate that matches the CNO-injected CA bundle ConfigMap in the operator namespace.
126		// This ConfigMap is NOT managed by trust-manager-controller (no managed label) but we need to detect
127		// when CNO updates the trusted CA bundle so we can reformat and propagate it.
128		injectedCABundleConfigMapPredicate := predicate.NewPredicateFuncs(func(object client.Object) bool {
129			return object.GetNamespace() == common.OperatorNamespace &&
130				object.GetName() == common.TrustedCABundleConfigMapName
131		})

137			Watches(&appsv1.Deployment{}, handler.EnqueueRequestsFromMapFunc(mapFunc), withIgnoreStatusUpdatePredicates).

151	// Reconcile function to compare the state specified by the TrustManager object against the actual cluster state,
152	// and to make the cluster state reflect the state specified by the user.
153	func (r *Reconciler) Reconcile(ctx context.Context, req ctrl.Request) (ctrl.Result, error) {
154		r.log.V(1).Info("reconciling", "request", req)
155	
156		// Fetch the trustmanager.openshift.operator.io CR
157		trustManager := &v1alpha1.TrustManager{}
158		// Note: No namespace because TrustManager is cluster-scoped
159		if err := r.Get(ctx, types.NamespacedName{Name: req.Name}, trustManager); err != nil {
160			if errors.IsNotFound(err) {
161				// NotFound errors, since they can't be fixed by an immediate
162				// requeue (have to wait for a new notification), and can be processed
163				// on deleted requests.
164				r.log.V(1).Info("trustmanager.openshift.operator.io object not found, skipping reconciliation", "request", req)
